title: As workers worry about AI, Nvidia’s Jensen Huang says AI is ‘creating an enormous number of jobs’
description: The Nvidia CEO seems to feel that claims of AI's job-killing potential have been greatly exaggerated.
descriptionDE: Der Nvidia-CEO scheint der Meinung zu sein, dass die Behauptungen über das arbeitsplatzvernichtende Potenzial von KI stark übertrieben seien.
titleDE: Während sich die Arbeitnehmer über KI Sorgen machen, sagt Jensen Huang von Nvidia, dass KI „eine enorme Anzahl von Arbeitsplätzen schafft“

title: OpenAI’s president does ‘all the things,’ except answer a question
description:
When the bromance sours, we all end up in court. | Image: Cath Virginia / The Verge, Getty Images	

The strongest witness for Elon Musk's case against OpenAI so far has been Greg Brockman's journal. Brockman himself is running as a close second.
Brockman was called to the stand in a rather unusual way - he was cross-examined first, followed by a direct examination - and he had some serious high school debate club energy. There was a lot of "I wouldn't characterize it that way," "I wouldn't say it that way," and "That sounds like something I wrote. Can I see it in context?" When Musk's attorney, Steven Molo, read some of the evidence aloud, Brockman would pedantically correct him if he skipped a word, even if that word was "a" or "the." Wh …
Read the full story at The Verge.
descriptionDE: Wenn die Bromance sauer wird, landen wir alle vor Gericht. | Bild: Cath Virginia / The Verge, Getty Images Der stärkste Zeuge für Elon Musks Fall gegen OpenAI war bisher Greg Brockmans Tagebuch. Brockman selbst liegt knapp dahinter. Brockman wurde auf eher ungewöhnliche Weise in den Zeugenstand gerufen ...
titleDE: Der Präsident von OpenAI erledigt „alles“, außer dass er eine Frage beantwortet

title: OpenAI’s cozy partner Cerebras is on track for a blockbuster IPO
description: AI chip maker Cerebras is heading for a blockbuster IPO that could value it at $26.6 billion or more. Its relationship with OpenAI is deep and rich.
descriptionDE: Der KI-Chiphersteller Cerebras steuert auf einen Blockbuster-Börsengang zu, der einen Wert von 26,6 Milliarden US-Dollar oder mehr haben könnte. Die Beziehung zu OpenAI ist tief und fruchtbar.
titleDE: OpenAIs gemütlicher Partner Cerebras ist auf dem Weg zu einem Blockbuster-Börsengang

title: OpenAI and PwC collaborate to reimagine the office of the CFO
description: OpenAI and PwC are partnering to help enterprises use AI agents to automate finance workflows, improve forecasting, strengthen controls, and modernize the CFO function.
descriptionDE: OpenAI und PwC arbeiten zusammen, um Unternehmen dabei zu helfen, KI-Agenten einzusetzen, um Finanzabläufe zu automatisieren, Prognosen zu verbessern, Kontrollen zu stärken und die CFO-Funktion zu modernisieren.
titleDE: OpenAI und PwC arbeiten zusammen, um das Amt des CFO neu zu gestalten

title: Image AI models now drive app growth, beating chatbot upgrades
description: Appfigures finds visual model launches generate 6.5x more downloads — but most don’t convert that spike into revenue.
descriptionDE: Appfigures stellt fest, dass die Einführung visueller Modelle 6,5-mal mehr Downloads generiert – aber die meisten wandeln diesen Anstieg nicht in Umsatz um.
titleDE: Bild-KI-Modelle treiben jetzt das App-Wachstum voran und schlagen Chatbot-Upgrades

title: GameStop offers $56 billion for eBay, struggles to explain how it'll pay for it
description: Amid falling revenue and store closures, GameStop wants to buy the much larger eBay.
descriptionDE: Angesichts sinkender Umsätze und Ladenschließungen will GameStop das viel größere eBay kaufen.
titleDE: GameStop bietet eBay 56 Milliarden US-Dollar an und kann nicht erklären, wie das Unternehmen dafür bezahlen soll

title: The latest AI news we announced in April 2026
description: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from April 2026
descriptionDE: Hier sind die neuesten KI-Updates von Google vom April 2026
titleDE: Die neuesten KI-Neuigkeiten haben wir im April 2026 angekündigt

title: Elon Musk’s only AI expert witness at the OpenAI trial fears an AGI arms race
description: Stuart Russell is a long-time AI researcher who thinks governments need to restrain frontier labs.
descriptionDE: Stuart Russell ist ein langjähriger KI-Forscher, der der Meinung ist, dass Regierungen Grenzlabore einschränken müssen.
titleDE: Elon Musks einziger KI-Experte beim OpenAI-Prozess befürchtet ein AGI-Wettrüsten

title: The creator of Roomba is back with a furry robot companion
description:
The first “Familiar” from Colin Angle’s new startup, Familiar Machines & Magic, is a robot that is designed to live in your home and interact autonomously with family members. | Image: Familiar Machines and Magic	

Colin Angle, the maker of the Roomba and the man who helped put 50 million household robots into people's homes, is back with a new robot. But this one is designed as a companion, not a cleaner.
The first robot from Angle's new company, Familiar Machines & Magic, is a dog-sized robotic pet that resembles a cross between a bear, a barn owl, and a golden retriever. It has an expressive face, with movable eyebrows, ears, and eyes, and the company calls it a "Familiar," a name meant to evoke folklore around the idea of a supernatural companion. Based on a demo video I saw ahead of its appearance at the WSJ Future of Everything conference this w …
Read the full story at The Verge.
descriptionDE: Der erste „Familiar“ von Colin Angles neuem Startup Familiar Machines & Magic ist ein Roboter, der in Ihrem Zuhause leben und autonom mit Familienmitgliedern interagieren soll. | Bild: Familiar Machines und Magic Colin Angle, der Hersteller von Roomba und der Mann, der dabei geholfen hat, 50 Millionen Haushaltsro...
titleDE: Der Erfinder von Roomba ist mit einem pelzigen Roboterbegleiter zurück

title: Sierra raises $950M as the race to own enterprise AI gets serious
description: The raise gives Sierra more than $1 billion to work with — capital the company says it will use to become the "global standard" for AI-powered customer experiences.
descriptionDE: Durch die Erhöhung erhält Sierra mehr als 1 Milliarde US-Dollar für die Zusammenarbeit – Kapital, mit dem das Unternehmen nach eigenen Angaben zum „globalen Standard“ für KI-gestützte Kundenerlebnisse werden will.
titleDE: Sierra sammelt 950 Millionen US-Dollar, während der Wettlauf um die eigene Unternehmens-KI ernst wird

title: Elon Musk sent ominous texts to Greg Brockman, Sam Altman after asking for a settlement, OpenAI claims
description: Musk texted OpenAI's president and co-founder saying that he and CEO Sam Altman "will be the most hated men in America" if OpenAI doesn't settle the suit.
descriptionDE: Musk schrieb dem Präsidenten und Mitbegründer von OpenAI eine SMS und sagte, dass er und CEO Sam Altman „die am meisten gehassten Männer in Amerika sein werden“, wenn OpenAI den Rechtsstreit nicht beilegt.
titleDE: Elon Musk schickte Greg Brockman und Sam Altman bedrohliche Texte, nachdem er um eine Einigung gebeten hatte, behauptet OpenAI

title: Anthropic and OpenAI are both launching joint ventures for enterprise AI services
description: Both Anthropic and OpenAI have partnered with asset managers to more aggressively market their enterprise AI products.
descriptionDE: Sowohl Anthropic als auch OpenAI haben sich mit Vermögensverwaltern zusammengetan, um ihre KI-Produkte für Unternehmen aggressiver zu vermarkten.
titleDE: Anthropic und OpenAI starten beide Joint Ventures für KI-Dienste für Unternehmen

title: Week one of the Musk v. Altman trial: What it was like in the room
description: This story originally appeared in The Algorithm, our weekly newsletter on AI. To get stories like this in your inbox first, sign up here. Two of the most powerful people in AI—Sam Altman and Elon Musk—began their face-off in court in Oakland, California, last week. Musk is suing OpenAI, alleging that the millions he spent to…
descriptionDE: Diese Geschichte erschien ursprünglich in The Algorithm, unserem wöchentlichen Newsletter zum Thema KI. Um Geschichten wie diese zuerst in Ihrem Posteingang zu erhalten, melden Sie sich hier an. Zwei der mächtigsten Köpfe der KI – Sam Altman und Elon Musk – begannen letzte Woche ihre Auseinandersetzung vor Gericht in Oakland, Kalifornien. Musk verklagt OpenAI und behauptet, dass...
titleDE: Woche eins des Prozesses Musk gegen Altman: Wie es im Raum war

title: Live updates from Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s court battle over the future of OpenAI
description:
Sam Altman and Elon Musk are facing off in a high-stakes trial that could alter the future of OpenAI and its most well-known product, ChatGPT. In 2024, Musk filed a lawsuit accusing OpenAI of abandoning its founding mission of developing AI to benefit humanity and shifting focus to boosting profits instead. 
The trial began with jury selection on April 27th. Elon Musk took the stand on April 28th as the first witness called, portraying his interest in founding OpenAI as an effort to help save humanity, then returned to the stand on April 29th and again for a third day of testimony on April 30th, before his financial manager and Neuralink CEO, Jared Birchall, took the stand.
Week two of the trial has begun, with professor Stuart Russell and OpenAI cofounder Greg Brockman scheduled to take the stand on Monday, May 4th, and, for the first time, a live audio stream on YouTube.
Musk was a cofounder of OpenAI and claims that Altman and Brockman tricked him into giving the company money, only to turn their backs on their original goal. However, OpenAI says that “This lawsuit has always been a baseless and jealous bid to derail a competitor” in a bid to boost Musk’s own SpaceX / xAI / X companies that have launched Grok as a competitor to ChatGPT.
In his lawsuit, Musk is asking for the removal of Altman and Brockman, and for OpenAI to stop operating as a public benefit corporation. Musk has also demanded that OpenAI’s nonprofit receive up to $150 billion in damages he’s asking for if he wins the case.

Here’s all the latest on the trial between Musk and Altman:
OpenAI’s president does ‘all the things,’ except answer a question
			
Jury is sent out for the day.
			
We are hearing about the early days of OpenAI.
			
Early worries about Musk came from Ilya Sutskever.
			
Brockman is describing his bromance with Altman.
			
“I do all the things.”
			
Brockman says we are 80 percent of the way to AGI.
			
Open AI’s direct examination of Brockman is pretty sedate so far… aside from Tesla.
			
OpenAI’s lawyers are now getting their shot at Brockman.
			
For real, I think nerds should not testify in court.
			
We are now looking at Brockman’s other financial dealings.
			
We finished with the Microsoft investment pretty quickly.
			
Altman didn’t return after we took our break.
			
We are presently having a fight about purple boxes.
			
We have been doing the same question for perhaps the last five minutes.
			
“Financially what will take me to $1B?”
			
“His story will correctly be that we weren’t honest with him in the end about still wanting to do the for profit just without him.”
			
Greg Brockman’s journal: “it’d be wrong to steal the non-profit from him.”
			
Brockman is not doing himself any favors.
			
Brockman’s cross examination isn’t as testy as Musk’s, but he’s also pushing back on a lot of questions.
			
Is sending stuff to Sam Teller and Shivon Zilis the same as sending it to Musk?
			
Brockman and Altman’s alliance?
			
“Is Demis Hassabis evil?”
			
Greg Brockman is talking about the earliest days of OpenAI.
			
Greg Brockman and Sam Altman have just entered the courtroom.
			
We’re done with Russell.
			
“The age of abundance for Elon.”
			
Oh now we have some meat.
			
Elon Musk’s expert doesn’t follow him on X.
			
I am befuddled by this expert testimony.
			
We are dealing with the cross now.
			
Sure is lucky that mentions of Grok’s safety issues got limited.
			
Individual vs. systemic risk.
			
We now have a very boring expert witness testifying to AI risks.
			
Stuart Russell is here to tell us about AI.
			
“I need that today. That’s good. I like that.”
			
Greg Brockman won’t be asked about Musk’s threat.
			
Elon Musk tried to settle before the trial — and got threatening.
			
Musk v. Altman is getting a live audio stream next week.
			
OpenAI Tesla receipts and other Musk v. Altman documents.
			
All the evidence revealed so far in Musk v. Altman
			
Here’s how Gabe Newell and Hideo Kojima ended up in the Musk v. Altman evidence.
			
The craziest part of Musk v. Altman happened while the jury was out of the room
			
Jury is being dismissed early so YGR can deal with an objection to Birchall’s testimony.
			
Birchall is actually very funny outside of court? Good for him.
			
We are now hearing about the pause in quarterly donations.
			
We’re back.
			
Second break of the day.
			
Birchall cross.
			
Elon Musk confirms xAI used OpenAI’s models to train Grok
			
Birchall has just been asked about the four Teslas.
			
Birchall testifies about Musk’s contributions to OpenAI.
			
A woman in the gallery has lowered a sleep mask over her eyes and is attempting to sleep.
			
Musk steps down. He may be recalled.
			
We are on re-cross. Musk is getting testy again.
			
The Microsoft investment comes back up.
			
And we’re back.
			
We’re in break — and I just checked out something interesting.
			
Elon Musk’s robot army definitely will not kill you.
			
Musk insists he wasn’t kneecapping OpenAI.
			
Musk seems notably more subdued today.
			
“At least change the name,” Musk says he told Altman.
			
Elon Musk v. Capitalism.
			
An “ongoing conversation” around open source.
			
We’re still talking about whether Musk read the term sheet.
			
The jurors have been seated.
			
Musk has just entered the courtroom.
			
“Issues of extinction are excluded.”
			
Good morning!
			
Elon Musk’s worst enemy in court is Elon Musk
			
Freedom!
			
Unfortunately we will not be talking about safety details of any specific product.
			
The jury is leaving for the day. “I suspect it’s a nice day out there,” YGR says.
			
MechaHitler might be a bad look for the AI safety defender.
			
Musk’s broader AI safety commitment (or lack thereof) comes up.
			
This is so testy.
			
Did Musk even read the OpenAI term sheet?
			
Musk asked Shivon Zilis to stay “close and friendly” with OpenAI to keep info flowing.
			
Musk says xAI probably won’t be the first to get to AGI.
			
We’re back from a break, talking about SpaceX and xAI.
			
Don’t worry about Tesla’s robot army!
			
“You mostly do unfair questions.”
			
“It’s a free country.”
			
“Will you answer my question?”
			
Musk’s desire for control comes up again.
			
“This is a hypothetical.”
			
Did Musk initially envision OpenAI as a corporation?
			
Musk is being combative on cross already.
			
“I did say that I would commit up to a billion dollars, yes.”
			
Is Tesla really not working on AGI?
			
Musk is returning to the stand.
			
At times, being a judge is much like being a kindergarten teacher.
			
We’re on a break.
			
“I mean, all due respect to Microsoft, do you really want Microsoft controlling digital superintelligence?”
			
“What’s going on here this is a bait and switch.”
			
A Musk-Altman spat about Microsoft.
			
Musk really cannot help himself.
			
“Capped profit” wasn’t an issue, even when Microsoft got involved.
			
“Tesla is not pursuing AGI.”
			
Musk is more on his game today.
			
“After I received these reassurances that OpenAI would continue to be a nonprofit I continued to donate over $10 million.”
			
“I actually was a fool who provided free funding for them to create a startup.”
			
More discussion of who would own OpenAI.
			
“I don’t lose my temper,” says Elon Musk.
			
“2017 was a hard year, and we’ve made mistakes.”
			
“I formed many for-profit tech companies, and could have done so with OAI,”
			
“Crystal clear focus.”
			
Sam Altman has just entered the room, right ahead of the jury.
			
A member of the public just got dressed down by YGR about taking photos.
			
Musk v. Altman et al. is back in session.
			
In naming OpenAI, Elon Musk worried anything related to the Turing Test could mean bad PR.
			
Elon Musk appeared more petty than prepared
			
That’s a wrap!
			
YGR scolds OpenAI for taking inconsistent positions on the origin of its name.
			
Elon Musk tells the jury that all he wants to do is save humanity
			
Arguments over ownership.
			
Apparently OpenAI could have had an ICO.
			
“I was not averse to a small for-profit,” Musk says.
			
We’re reading emails between Musk and Jensen Huang.
			
Musk says nonprofit was non-negotiable for OpenAI.
			
We’re at the founding of OpenAI.
			
Musk says he would have created something like OpenAI on his own.
			
Musk recalls meeting Sam Altman.
			
Sam Altman left during a break, but Elon Musk’s lawyer didn’t notice.
			
“Here we are in 2026 and AI is scary smart.”
			
“I have extreme concerns about AI,” says Musk.
			
AI will be as smart as “any human as soon as next year.”
			
Musk claims he has time for SpaceX, Tesla, Neuralink, and the Boring Company because he works a lot.
			
Musk is telling the jury he (co)founded Tesla.
			
Neuralink’s long-term goal is… AI?
			
“There need to be things that people are excited about that make life worth living … Being out there among the stars can excite everyone.”
			
A little Musk biography.
			
Elon Musk, looking funereal in a black suit with a black tie, says “it’s not okay to steal a charity.”
			
Elon Musk takes the stand in high-profile trial against OpenAI
			
We are back from a break.
			
Elon Musk will be the first witness in Musk v. Altman.
			
“Microsoft unlocked with OpenAI a virtuous cycle.”
			
Microsoft enters the chat.
			
“We are here because Mr. Musk didn’t get his way at OpenAI.”
			
“[Musk] demanded control, he demanded the ability to make all the decisions without regard to the other founders.”
			
OpenAI lawyers argue that Elon was right in the middle of discussions about a for-profit pivot.
			
“Musk was furious that OpenAI succeeded.”
			
OpenAI: Musk’s lawsuit is a “pageant of hypocrisy.”
			
Sam Altman’s “related party conflicted transactions” are how he made money on OpenAI, Molo says.
			
Technical difficulties.
			
OpenAI is like a museum store that has looted the Picassos and pocketed the profits.
			
AGI might be out of fashion in the AI world, but it will be at the center of this trial.
			
“The defendants in this case stole a charity.”
			
Musk and Altman go to court
			
Good morning from the Musk v. Altman line outside the courtroom.
			
Jury selection in Musk v. Altman: ‘People don’t like him’
			
We have a jury.
			
Elon Musk’s lawyer tried to get some jurors thrown out for disliking Musk.
			
Apparently things are exciting outside.
			
We have gone through the first 20 potential jurors.
			
Voir dire has begun.
			
The Elon Musk vs. OpenAI trial starts today.
			
Elon Musk drops fraud claims against OpenAI and Sam Altman before trial.
			
Musk vs. Altman is here, and it’s going to get messy
			
Elon Musk is about to be a very busy boy!
			
‘Sideshow’ concerns and billionaire dreams: What I learned from Elon Musk’s lawsuit against OpenAI
			
Elon Musk’s xAI is suing OpenAI and Apple
			
Inside Elon Musk’s messy breakup with OpenAI
			
Elon Musk is suing OpenAI and Sam Altman again
descriptionDE: Sam Altman und Elon Musk stehen sich in einem hochriskanten Prozess gegenüber, der die Zukunft von OpenAI und seinem bekanntesten Produkt, ChatGPT, verändern könnte. Im Jahr 2024 reichte Musk eine Klage ein, in der er OpenAI beschuldigte, seine Gründungsmission, KI zum Nutzen der Menschheit zu entwickeln, aufgegeben und den Fokus auf die Steigerung der Gewinne verlagert zu haben ...
titleDE: Live-Updates vom Gerichtsstreit zwischen Elon Musk und Sam Altman über die Zukunft von OpenAI

title: Reduce friction and latency for long-running jobs with Webhooks in Gemini API

descriptionDE: Ereignisgesteuerte Webhooks sind ein Push-basiertes Benachrichtigungssystem, das ineffiziente Abfragen überflüssig macht.
titleDE: Reduzieren Sie Reibung und Latenz für lang laufende Jobs mit Webhooks in der Gemini API

title: DoorDash adds AI tools to speed up merchant onboarding, edit photos of dishes
description: DoorDash on Monday added new AI-powered tools that let merchants speed up onboarding, edit photos to make dishes look better, and create new websites from existing content.
descriptionDE: DoorDash hat am Montag neue KI-gestützte Tools hinzugefügt, mit denen Händler das Onboarding beschleunigen, Fotos bearbeiten können, um Gerichte besser aussehen zu lassen, und neue Websites aus vorhandenen Inhalten erstellen können.
titleDE: DoorDash fügt KI-Tools hinzu, um das Onboarding von Händlern zu beschleunigen und Fotos von Gerichten zu bearbeiten

title: Tailoring AI solutions for health care needs
description: The AI market is full of big promises of grand transformation. Health care is a prime target for those promises, beset as it is by financial pressures, labor shortages, and the growing burden of caring for an aging population. AI developers are targeting functions that vary widely, from curing cancer and performing surgery to streamlining…
descriptionDE: Der KI-Markt ist voller großer Versprechen einer großen Transformation. Das Gesundheitswesen ist ein Hauptziel dieser Versprechen, da es von finanziellem Druck, Arbeitskräftemangel und der wachsenden Belastung durch die Pflege einer alternden Bevölkerung geprägt ist. KI-Entwickler zielen auf Funktionen ab, die sehr unterschiedlich sind, von der Heilung von Krebs ...
titleDE: Maßgeschneiderte KI-Lösungen für die Bedürfnisse des Gesundheitswesens

title: How OpenAI delivers low-latency voice AI at scale
description: How OpenAI rebuilt its WebRTC stack to power real-time Voice AI with low latency, global scale, and seamless conversational turn-taking.
descriptionDE: Wie OpenAI seinen WebRTC-Stack umgestaltet hat, um Sprach-KI in Echtzeit mit geringer Latenz, globaler Skalierbarkeit und nahtloser Konversationsabwicklung zu ermöglichen.
titleDE: Wie OpenAI skalierbare Sprach-KI mit geringer Latenz bereitstellt

title: ‘This is fine’ creator says AI startup stole his art
description: The ad comes from Artisan, the AI startup behind billboards urging businesses to "stop hiring humans."
descriptionDE: Die Anzeige stammt von Artisan, dem KI-Startup hinter Werbetafeln, das Unternehmen dazu auffordert, „keine Menschen mehr einzustellen“.
titleDE: „Das ist in Ordnung“, sagt der Schöpfer, KI-Startup habe seine Kunst gestohlen

title: In Harvard study, AI offered more accurate emergency room diagnoses than two human doctors
description: A new study examines how large language models perform in a variety of medical contexts, including real emergency room cases — where at least one model seemed to be more accurate than human doctors.
descriptionDE: Eine neue Studie untersucht, wie große Sprachmodelle in verschiedenen medizinischen Kontexten funktionieren, einschließlich realer Notaufnahmen – bei denen mindestens ein Modell genauer zu sein schien als menschliche Ärzte.
titleDE: In einer Harvard-Studie lieferte KI genauere Diagnosen in der Notaufnahme als zwei menschliche Ärzte

title: How the internet’s favorite squirrel dad made the hottest camera app of 2026
description:
Downey at home in LA with one of his channel’s frequent guest stars. | Image: The Verge; Shutterstock	

It's not hyperbole to call DualShot Recorder an overnight sensation. 
It took only 12 hours from the time it was released to hit number one on the App Store's list of top paid apps. It was a surprise success - but what's even more surprising is the app's origin story: it all started with a cadre of friendly neighborhood squirrels and their favorite caretaker.
Derrick Downey Jr. built a career on short-form videos documenting his interactions with the squirrels that visit his patio in LA. His Instagram and TikTok accounts each have well over a million followers (myself included) who know well the regular cast of characters: Maxine, Richard, …
Read the full story at The Verge.
descriptionDE: Downey zu Hause in LA mit einem der häufigen Gaststars seines Senders. | Bild: The Verge; Shutterstock Es ist keine Übertreibung, den DualShot Recorder als eine Sensation über Nacht zu bezeichnen. Es dauerte nur 12 Stunden nach der Veröffentlichung, bis es auf Platz eins der App Store-Liste der bestbezahlten Apps landete. Es war eine Überraschung...
titleDE: Wie der beliebteste Eichhörnchen-Vater im Internet die heißeste Kamera-App des Jahres 2026 erstellt hat

title: AI music is flooding streaming services — but who wants it?
description:
This is The Stepback, a weekly newsletter breaking down one essential story from the tech world. For more on how AI is changing music and the music industry, follow Terrence O'Brien. The Stepback arrives in our subscribers' inboxes at 8AM ET. Opt in for The Stepback here.
How it started
The use of generative AI in pop music started almost as a gimmick. There was a sense of experimentalism to 2018's I AM AI by Taryn Southern and 2019's Proto by Holly Herndon, albums that were created with significant assistance from AI. Others got in on the action too, exploring the outer limits of tools like Google's Magenta and even training their own mod …
Read the full story at The Verge.
descriptionDE: Dies ist „The Stepback“, ein wöchentlicher Newsletter, der eine wichtige Geschichte aus der Tech-Welt aufschlüsselt. Um mehr darüber zu erfahren, wie KI die Musik und die Musikindustrie verändert, folgen Sie Terrence O'Brien. Der Stepback erreicht die Posteingänge unserer Abonnenten um 8 Uhr ET. Melden Sie sich hier für The Stepback an. Wie es begann Die Verwendung von g...
titleDE: KI-Musik überschwemmt Streaming-Dienste – aber wer will das schon?

title: AI-generated actors and scripts are now ineligible for Oscars
description: The Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences said that only performances “credited in the film’s legal billing and demonstrably performed by humans with their consent” will be eligible for Academy Awards.
descriptionDE: Die Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences sagte, dass nur Darbietungen, „die in der gesetzlichen Abrechnung des Films aufgeführt sind und nachweislich von Menschen mit deren Zustimmung aufgeführt wurden“, für die Oscar-Verleihung in Frage kommen.
titleDE: KI-generierte Schauspieler und Drehbücher sind jetzt für Oscars ausgeschlossen

title: The best AI dictation apps, tested and ranked
description: AI-powered dictation apps are useful for replying to emails, taking notes, and even coding through your voice
descriptionDE: KI-gestützte Diktier-Apps sind nützlich, um E-Mails zu beantworten, Notizen zu machen und sogar mit Ihrer Stimme zu programmieren
titleDE: Die besten KI-Diktier-Apps, getestet und bewertet

title: Replit’s Amjad Masad on the Cursor deal, fighting Apple, and why he’d rather not sell
description: At TechCrunch's sold-out StrictlyVC event in San Francisco on Thursday night, we covered a lot of ground in a short time, beginning with the question everyone in the industry is asking right now: In a world where rival Cursor is reportedly in talks to be acquired by SpaceX for $60 billion, is Replit also bound to sell?
descriptionDE: Auf der ausverkauften StrictlyVC-Veranstaltung von TechCrunch in San Francisco am Donnerstagabend haben wir in kurzer Zeit viel erreicht, angefangen mit der Frage, die sich derzeit jeder in der Branche stellt: In einer Welt, in der der Rivale Cursor Berichten zufolge Gespräche über die Übernahme durch SpaceX für 60 Milliarden US-Dollar führt, ist Replit...
titleDE: Amjad Masad von Replit über den Cursor-Deal, den Kampf gegen Apple und warum er lieber nicht verkaufen möchte

title: Meta buys robotics startup to bolster its humanoid AI ambitions
description: Meta bought humanoid startup Assured Robot Intelligence to beef up its AI models for robots, the company said.
descriptionDE: Meta kaufte das humanoide Startup Assured Robot Intelligence, um seine KI-Modelle für Roboter zu verbessern, sagte das Unternehmen.

title: Musk v. Altman week 1: Elon Musk says he was duped, warns AI could kill us all, and admits that xAI distills OpenAI’s models
description: In the first week of the landmark trial between Elon Musk and OpenAI, Musk took the stand in a crisp black suit and tie and argued that OpenAI CEO Sam Altman and president Greg Brockman had deceived him into bankrolling the company. Along the way, he warned that AI could destroy us all and sat through…
descriptionDE: In der ersten Woche des bahnbrechenden Prozesses zwischen Elon Musk und OpenAI bezog Musk in einem eleganten schwarzen Anzug und einer Krawatte Stellung und argumentierte, dass OpenAI-CEO Sam Altman und Präsident Greg Brockman ihn getäuscht hätten, das Unternehmen zu finanzieren. Unterwegs warnte er, dass KI uns alle zerstören könnte und saß da...
titleDE: Musk vs. Altman Woche 1: Elon Musk sagt, er sei betrogen worden, warnt davor, dass KI uns alle töten könnte, und gibt zu, dass xAI die Modelle von OpenAI destilliert

title: All the evidence revealed so far in Musk v. Altman
description:
The Musk v. Altman trial is underway, and that means exhibits, or the evidence to be presented in court, are being revealed piece by piece. So far, email exchanges, photos, and corporate documents are circulating from the earliest days of OpenAI - and from before the AI lab even had a name. Some high-level takeaways: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang gave OpenAI an in-demand supercomputer, Musk largely drafted OpenAI's mission and heavily influenced its early structure, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman appeared to want to lean heavily on Y Combinator for early support for OpenAI, OpenAI president Greg Brockman and Ilya Sutskever worried about Musk's level of con …
Read the full story at The Verge.
descriptionDE: Der Prozess Musk gegen Altman ist im Gange, und das bedeutet, dass Beweisstücke oder Beweise, die vor Gericht vorgelegt werden sollen, Stück für Stück enthüllt werden. Bisher kursieren E-Mail-Austausch, Fotos und Unternehmensdokumente aus den Anfängen von OpenAI – und aus der Zeit, bevor das KI-Labor überhaupt einen Namen hatte. Einige hoch...
titleDE: Alle bisher im Fall Musk gegen Altman enthüllten Beweise

title: Ubuntu infrastructure has been down for more than a day
description: The outage has hampered communication concerning a critical vulnerability that gives root.

titleDE: Wussten Sie, dass Sie eine Wohltätigkeitsorganisation nicht stehlen können? Mach dir keine Sorge. Elon Musk wird Sie daran erinnern.

title: Pentagon inks deals with Nvidia, Microsoft, and AWS to deploy AI on classified networks
description: The deals come as the DOD has doubled down on diversifying its exposure to AI vendors in the wake of its controversial dispute with Anthropic over usage terms of its AI models.
descriptionDE: Die Deals kommen zustande, da das US-Verteidigungsministerium nach dem kontroversen Streit mit Anthropic über die Nutzungsbedingungen seiner KI-Modelle sein Engagement bei KI-Anbietern verstärkt diversifiziert hat.
titleDE: Pentagon schließt Verträge mit Nvidia, Microsoft und AWS ab, um KI in geheimen Netzwerken einzusetzen

title: Cyber-Insecurity in the AI Era
description: Cybersecurity was already under strain before AI entered the stack. Now, as AI expands the attack surface and adds new complexity, the limits of legacy approaches are becoming harder to ignore. This session from MIT Technology Review’s EmTech AI conference explores why security must be rethought with AI at its core, not layered on after…
descriptionDE: Die Cybersicherheit war bereits unter Druck, bevor KI Einzug hielt. Da KI nun die Angriffsfläche erweitert und neue Komplexität hinzufügt, werden die Grenzen veralteter Ansätze immer schwerer zu ignorieren. In dieser Sitzung der EmTech AI-Konferenz des MIT Technology Review geht es darum, warum Sicherheit neu gedacht werden muss ...
titleDE: Cyber-Unsicherheit im KI-Zeitalter

title: Operationalizing AI for Scale and Sovereignty
description: Companies are taking control of their own data to tailor AI for their needs. The challenge lies in balancing ownership with the safe, trusted flow of high‑quality data needed to power reliable insights. This conversation from MIT Technology Review’s EmTech AI conference examines how AI factories unlock new levels of scale, sustainability, and governance—positioning data…
descriptionDE: Unternehmen übernehmen die Kontrolle über ihre eigenen Daten, um KI an ihre Bedürfnisse anzupassen. Die Herausforderung besteht darin, die Verantwortung mit dem sicheren, vertrauenswürdigen Fluss hochwertiger Daten in Einklang zu bringen, die für zuverlässige Erkenntnisse erforderlich sind. In diesem Gespräch von der EmTech AI-Konferenz des MIT Technology Review wird untersucht, wie KI-Fabriken ...
titleDE: Operationalisierung der KI für Skalierung und Souveränität

title: Pentagon strikes classified AI deals with OpenAI, Google, and Nvidia — but not Anthropic
description:
The Pentagon has struck deals with OpenAI, Google, Microsoft, Amazon, Nvidia, Elon Musk's xAI, and the startup Reflection, allowing the agency to use their AI tools in classified settings, according to an announcement on Friday. At the same time, the Defense Department has left out Anthropic - which it previously used for classified information - after declaring it a supply-chain risk.
This builds upon deals with OpenAI and xAI, which have already reached agreements with the Pentagon for the "lawful" use of their AI systems. A report from The Information suggests Google has struck a similar agreement. As noted by The Wall Street Journal, Mi …
Read the full story at The Verge.
descriptionDE: Laut einer Ankündigung vom Freitag hat das Pentagon Verträge mit OpenAI, Google, Microsoft, Amazon, Nvidia, Elon Musks xAI und dem Startup Reflection abgeschlossen, die es der Behörde ermöglichen, ihre KI-Tools in geheimen Umgebungen einzusetzen. Gleichzeitig hat das Verteidigungsministerium Anthropic weggelassen – was...
titleDE: Das Pentagon schließt geheime KI-Deals mit OpenAI, Google und Nvidia ab – aber nicht mit Anthropic

title: Elon Musk had a bad week in court
description:
Elon Musk is the one who wanted this trial. He has spent months claiming OpenAI "stole a nonprofit," and saying he was the actual driving force behind one of the most important companies currently in tech. All indications are that he won't win his case against the company, but he's fighting it anyway. So you'd think he'd have done better when it was his time to take the stand.

Verge subscribers, don't forget you get exclusive access to ad-free Vergecast wherever you get your podcasts. Head here. Not a subscriber? You can sign up here.
Instead, Musk spent much of the week arguing with lawyers (including his own!), changing his story, an …
Read the full story at The Verge.
descriptionDE: Elon Musk ist derjenige, der diesen Prozess wollte. Er hat Monate damit verbracht, zu behaupten, OpenAI habe „eine gemeinnützige Organisation gestohlen“ und er sei die eigentliche treibende Kraft hinter einem der derzeit wichtigsten Technologieunternehmen. Alles deutet darauf hin, dass er seinen Prozess gegen das Unternehmen nicht gewinnen wird, aber er kämpft trotzdem dagegen ...
titleDE: Elon Musk hatte eine schlechte Woche vor Gericht

title: Christian content creators are outsourcing AI slop to gig workers on Fiverr
description:
In the beginning, platforms like Fiverr were places where people could hire freelancers to do specialized creative labor using skills that took years to develop. In the age of generative AI, though, many of these gig workers have embraced the technology in order to meet clients' demands. These workers' profiles emphasize that they can quickly (and cheaply) whip up images and videos of just about anything. But often, what their clients are looking for are dramatic animations inspired by the Christian Bible.
On TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, and Facebook it is very easy to stumble across AI-generated clips that retell stories from the Bible. Lik …
Read the full story at The Verge.
descriptionDE: Anfangs waren Plattformen wie Fiverr Orte, an denen Menschen Freiberufler einstellen konnten, die spezialisierte kreative Arbeit leisteten und dabei Fähigkeiten nutzten, deren Entwicklung Jahre dauerte. Im Zeitalter der generativen KI haben sich jedoch viele dieser Gig-Worker die Technologie zu eigen gemacht, um den Anforderungen der Kunden gerecht zu werden. Diese funktionieren...
titleDE: Christliche Content-Ersteller lagern die KI-Arbeit an Gig-Worker auf Fiverr aus

Ein neues US-Telefonnetz für Christen soll pornografische und geschlechtsbezogene Inhalte blockieren. Ein neues US-weites Mobilfunknetz für Christen soll nächstes Jahr in Betrieb gehen ...

title: Microsoft wants lawyers to trust its new AI agent in Word documents
description:
Microsoft is launching a new AI agent inside Word that's specifically designed for legal teams. Legal Agent handles document edits, negotiation history, and complex documents to help legal teams handle tasks like reviewing contracts.
"Instead of relying on general AI models to interpret commands, the agent follows structured workflows shaped by real legal practice, managing clearly defined, repeatable tasks like reviewing contracts clause by clause against a playbook," explains Sumit Chauhan, corporate vice president of Microsoft's Office Product Group. 
The Legal Agent can work with existing documents that have tracked changes, and analyz …
Read the full story at The Verge.
descriptionDE: Microsoft führt einen neuen KI-Agenten in Word ein, der speziell für Rechtsteams entwickelt wurde. Legal Agent kümmert sich um Dokumentbearbeitungen, den Verhandlungsverlauf und komplexe Dokumente, um Rechtsteams bei der Bewältigung von Aufgaben wie der Überprüfung von Verträgen zu unterstützen. „Anstatt sich bei der Interpretation von Befehlen auf allgemeine KI-Modelle zu verlassen, ...
titleDE: Microsoft möchte, dass Anwälte seinem neuen KI-Agenten in Word-Dokumenten vertrauen

title: Inexpensive seafloor-hopping submersibles could stoke deep-sea science—and mining
description: Smack dab between Australia and South America, the US National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA) research vessel Rainier is currently on a mission to map more than 8,000 square nautical miles of the Pacific seafloor in search of critical mineral deposits. But it isn’t doing it alone; for a month starting this week, it will…
descriptionDE: Knapp zwischen Australien und Südamerika ist das Forschungsschiff Rainier der US-amerikanischen National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA) derzeit auf einer Mission, mehr als 8.000 Quadratseemeilen des pazifischen Meeresbodens auf der Suche nach kritischen Mineralvorkommen zu kartieren. Aber es geht nicht allein; für...
titleDE: Kostengünstige Tauchboote, die über den Meeresboden springen, könnten die Tiefseewissenschaft und den Bergbau ankurbeln

title: Trump’s mass firing just dealt another blow to American science
description: This past week delivered another gut punch for science in the US. This time, the target was the National Science Foundation—a federal agency that funds major research projects to the tune of around $9 billion. The foundation’s efforts were overseen by a board of 22 prominent scientists. On Friday last week, they were all fired.…
descriptionDE: Die vergangene Woche hat der Wissenschaft in den USA einen weiteren Schlag ins Gesicht geliefert. Dieses Mal war das Ziel die National Science Foundation – eine Bundesbehörde, die große Forschungsprojekte im Wert von rund 9 Milliarden US-Dollar finanziert. Die Bemühungen der Stiftung wurden von einem Vorstand aus 22 prominenten Wissenschaftlern überwacht. Am Freitag la...
titleDE: Trumps Massenentlassungen haben der amerikanischen Wissenschaft einen weiteren Schlag versetzt

title: A new US phone network for Christians aims to block porn and gender-related content
description: A new US-wide cell phone network marketed to Christians is set to launch next week. It blocks porn, which experts in network security say marks the first time a US cell plan has used network-level blocking for such content that can’t be turned off even by adult account owners. It’s also rolling out a filter…
descriptionDE: Nächste Woche soll ein neues US-weites Mobilfunknetz für Christen an den Start gehen. Es blockiert Pornos, was laut Experten für Netzwerksicherheit das erste Mal ist, dass ein US-Mobilfunktarif eine Sperrung auf Netzwerkebene für solche Inhalte einsetzt, die selbst von erwachsenen Kontoinhabern nicht deaktiviert werden kann. Es rollt auch aus ...
titleDE: Ein neues US-Telefonnetzwerk für Christen zielt darauf ab, pornografische und geschlechtsbezogene Inhalte zu blockieren
